title: plumeria × stenopetala
intro: Plumeria × stenopetala, a hybrid plant species, is a cross between Plumeria obtusa and Plumeria stenopetala, known for its fragrant and delicate flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Plumeria × stenopetala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
